query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayMl, homeMl, modelRunAt, awayScore, homeScore, startTimeEst FROM games WHERE sport='NCAAM' AND gameDate='2026-03-26' ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC;
